form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 300m in 17.55 last start, beating Bacon. Likes the rails so was strongly supported and ran right away with it last time. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 300m in 17.55 last start, beating Bacon. Likes the rails so was strongly supported and ran right away with it last time. Follow up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was bumped heavily and became unbalanced in the back straight.
Heels galloped on rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 2.25 lengths second (17.60) over 300m at this track. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 2.25 lengths second (17.60) over 300m at this track. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on rounding the turn into the home straight.

form.formComment: Returned to racing last start with a poor run finished 6th in a Mix 3/4 on March 21 over 300m at this track behind Frank Chana beaten 5.5 lengths (18.30). Not far from winner last time but has the job ahead here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returned to racing last start with a poor run finished 6th in a Mix 3/4 on March 21 over 300m at this track behind Frank Chana beaten 5.5 lengths (18.30). Not far from winner last time but has the job ahead here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the first turn came together; Rounding the home turn came together.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 3 lengths at this track over 300m (17.59) beating Done By Noon in Grade 5 on April 8. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by 3 lengths at this track over 300m (17.59) beating Done By Noon in Grade 5 on April 8. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when fourth (17.85) at this track in a Grade 5. Will jump from box 5 for the first time. Will need some luck to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time when fourth (17.85) at this track in a Grade 5. Will jump from box 5 for the first time. Will need some luck to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow into stride; Checked off heels and lost momentum rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 300m at this track. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 300m at this track. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was bumped on the hindquarters rounding the home turn.
Was bumped and carried wider rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 300m. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 300m. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Showed good early speed on debut. Won by one length at this track (17.56) beating Earn Your Keep in a Maiden on April 8. Will find this much tougher but she's got good box manners and speed. Returned in great order and can make it back to back wins.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Showed good early speed on debut. Won by one length at this track (17.56) beating Earn Your Keep in a Maiden on April 8. Will find this much tougher but she's got good box manners and speed. Returned in great order and can make it back to back wins.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 7th over 365m at Nowra beaten 9 lengths (21.46) behind Market Maverick in a Grade 5 on April 6. Should be around the mark.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: At the last start finished 7th over 365m at Nowra beaten 9 lengths (21.46) behind Market Maverick in a Grade 5 on April 6. Should be around the mark.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels in the first turn and lost momentum.
At the first hampered when crowded for room, losing momentum.

form.formComment: Most recently finished last over 400m at The Gardens beaten 16 lengths (24.14) behind Savina in a Grade 5 on April 2. Leading chance on best form.
